mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.ID AS "id", A.create_by AS "create_by", A.owner_code AS "owner_code", A.card_title AS "card_title", A.card_type AS "card_type", A.card_link AS "card_link", A.sort AS "sort", A.is_enable AS "is_enable", A.detail_link AS "detail_link", A.detail_type AS "detail_type", A.col_props AS "col_props", A.remark_info AS "remark_info", A.group_name AS "group_name", '1' as "is_show" FROM prt_card A LEFT JOIN prt_card_role b ON A.ID = b.card_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role C ON b.role_id = C.role_id WHERE ( C.user_id = #{userId} OR b.role_id IS NULL ) AND A.is_enable = '1' ORDER BY A.sort

SELECT DISTINCT A .ID AS "id", A.create_by AS "create_by", A.owner_code AS "owner_code", A.card_title AS "card_title", A.card_type AS "card_type", A.card_link AS "card_link", d.sort AS "sort", A.is_enable AS "is_enable", A.detail_link AS "detail_link", A.detail_type AS "detail_type", A.col_props AS "col_props", A.remark_info AS "remark_info", d.is_show as "is_show", A.group_name as "group_name" FROM prt_card A LEFT JOIN prt_card_user d on a.id = d.card_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND A.is_enable = '1' ORDER BY d.sort
